    • setIncludeJunit

      public JkBaseScaffold setIncludeJunit(boolean includeJunit)
      Sets the flag to include Junit dependencies in the scaffold. Initial value is true.

    • toJkInject

      public static String toJkInject(List<String> deps)
      Converts a list of dependencies into a string representation of JkDep annotations.
      Parameters:
      deps - The list of dependencies to convert.
      Returns:
      The string representation of JkInject annotations.
